data.body:
My mom was born in 1944 in Mexico, in a world that told girls what they couldn’t do. She didn’t listen.

She hid basketball shorts under her skirt so her father wouldn’t know she played.

That defiance is where I come from.

I’m running for Congress because immigrants deserve respect, Trump doesn’t.
